title: Invoice Exception Triage Agent
caption: UiPath AgentHack 2026 prototype: coded invoice triage agent plus UiPath orchestration.
narration: This is Invoice Exception Triage Agent, a UiPath AgentHack prototype for accounts payable exception triage. It combines a Python coded agent with UiPath orchestration so clean invoices move quickly and risky invoices get human accountability.

title: Business Workflow
caption: Start -> Receive invoice -> Call triage API -> Decision gateway -> Auto approve, review, or human escalation.
narration: The workflow starts with a received invoice. UiPath calls the triage API, then a decision gateway branches to auto approval, analyst review, or human escalation. Every path ends with an audit record.

title: Engineering Proof
caption: 35 tests pass across risk rules, decisions, audit output, sample coverage, and API compatibility.
narration: The repository is not README-only. The test suite passes with thirty five tests covering risk rules, decisions, input validation, audit reports, expected outputs, and API compatibility for UiPath Studio Web.

title: Clean Invoice
caption: Approved supplier, matching PO, valid tax ID, normal terms -> LOW risk and AUTO_APPROVE.
narration: The clean invoice matches supplier and purchase order controls. It has no exception flags, so the agent returns low risk and auto approve. This is the straight through processing path.

title: Risky Invoice
caption: Duplicate, missing tax ID, unapproved supplier, missing PO, amount over PO, invalid terms -> HIGH risk.
narration: The risky invoice has multiple high risk indicators: duplicate invoice ID, missing tax ID, unapproved supplier, missing purchase order, amount over purchase order, and invalid payment terms. The decision is escalate to human.

title: Auditability
caption: Plain-English reasons, recommended action, audit summary, machine-readable flags, and rule version.
narration: For auditability, each result includes plain English reasons, a recommended action, a concise audit summary, machine readable flags, and a rule version. Technical failures never auto approve an invoice.

title: UiPath Studio Web Debug
caption: Real Studio Web API Workflow call returns HTTP 200 with HIGH risk and ESCALATE_TO_HUMAN.
narration: The UiPath Studio Web API Workflow was debug tested against a temporary HTTPS endpoint. The HTTP request completed successfully with status two hundred and returned high risk with escalate to human.

title: Submission Evidence
caption: Public GitHub repository, MIT license, OpenAPI contract, Codex evidence, demo script, and reproducible setup docs.
narration: The submission includes a public GitHub repository, MIT license, OpenAPI contract, sample data, expected outputs, UiPath setup documentation, a demo script, and Codex usage evidence integrated into the working solution.
